title: Support to --link option?
body:
Original docker cli still contains [--link](https://docs.docker.com/engine/reference/run/#expose-incoming-ports) option.
Is there any plan to make it working in podman?

comments.body: No, not at present. Our intended replacement is pods.
This issue had no activity for 30 days. In the absence of activity or the "do-not-close" label, the issue will be automatically closed within 7 days.
